snippet: A lead agent decomposes the query and spawns subagents that search in parallel, each with its own context window.
A supervisor coordinates parallel researchers; scoping precedes a research brief and a final report writer synthesises sections.
An iterative agent adaptively selects search engines and collects more sources than fixed pipelines before synthesising.
A code-driven agent loop browses the web and reads pages, performing well on the GAIA benchmark.
